backstory.original: Nahara is a reborn fallen Aasimar undead warlock/college of the spirits bard. She fell into the mists of Ravenloft unable to remember anything from her life (or past lives as we've come to learn). All she knows is that her current Patron, Azalin Rex, has asked her to aid him against his foe Strahd von Zarovich, who for reasons unknown to her, has been desperately seeking her out.
backstory.display: 纳哈拉是一个重生的堕落神裔亡灵邪术师/鬼灵学院的吟游诗人。她坠入鸦阁魔域的迷雾中，无法记起她生命（或我们已经了解到的前世）中的任何事。她只知道她现在的赞助者亚扎林·雷克斯，要求她协助对付他的敌人斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇，而后者由于她不知道的原因，一直在拼命寻找她。

description.original: Nahara attacks a random enemy and every enemy that she already hit with a bolt of energy.
description.display: 纳哈拉用能量束攻击一名随机敌人和她之前击中过的所有敌人。

longDescription.original: Nahara attacks a random enemy and every enemy that she has already hit with this attack.
longDescription.display: 纳哈拉攻击一名随机敌人和她之前使用此攻击方式击中过的所有敌人。

description.original: Nahara takes off and channels Azalin Rex, increasing her damage for 15 seconds.
description.display: 纳哈拉飞向空中并引导亚扎林·雷克斯，在 15 秒内增加自身伤害。

longDescription.original: Nahara takes off into the air and channels the power of her patron Azalin Rex for 15 seconds. Her damage is increased by 1,000% while in this form and any enemy she hits has a 50% chance of being stunned for 2 seconds.
longDescription.display: 纳哈拉飞向空中，引导她的赞助者亚扎林·雷克斯的力量，持续 15 秒。她的伤害增加 1000%，而在此形态下，她击中的任何敌人都有 50% 几率被眩晕 2 秒。

description.original: The more Nahara adventures, the more she remembers of her past life; slowly increasing her damage.
description.display: 纳哈拉参与的冒险越多，就回忆起更多自己的过去，缓慢提升她的伤害。

description.original: If Nahara is easily defeating enemies she helps her companions speed through later areas. If she is not defeating enemies easily she increases her damage.
description.display: 如果纳哈拉能轻松消灭敌人，就可以提升队伍向更深区域推进的速度。如果她无法轻松消灭敌人，则会提升自己的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) is eligible to start in all Strahd patron adventures, even if variant restrictions would say otherwise.
即使不满足支线任务限制要求，$(source_hero)仍有资格开始所有斯特拉德赞助者冒险。

$(source_hero) recovers a bit of her lost memory as she adventures. If $(source_hero) is in the formation when you complete an area for the first time, she gets a $(amount)% damage bonus, stacking additively. These bonuses persist through resets.
$(source_hero)在冒险途中会恢复少许遗失的记忆。如果你首次完成某个区域时$(amount)位于阵型中，她会获得 $(source_hero)% 的伤害加成（加算）。此加成在重置后会保留。

tipText.original: Nahara does more damage for every adventure area she completes over all time.
tipText.display: 在任何时间内，纳哈拉每完成一个冒险区域，都会造成更多伤害。

description.desc: When $(source_hero) attacks and defeats at least one enemy, she gains a Levity stack, with a maximum of $(max_stacks) stacks. When she attacks and doesn't defeat an enemy, she loses a Levity stack. $(source_hero) gets a $(amount___2)% damage bonus for each Levity stack she has below $(max_stacks), and at the start of each area, she reduces the area requirements by $(amount___3)% for each Levity stack above $(start_stacks).

当$(source_hero)攻击并击杀至少一名敌人时，她会获得 1 层“轻浮”堆叠层数，最高可叠加至 $(max_stacks) 层。当她的攻击未能击杀敌人时，会失去 1 层“轻浮”堆叠。在 $(max_stacks) 层以下时，每有一层“轻浮”堆叠，$(source_hero)获得 $(amount___2)% 伤害加成；且在每个区域开始时，“轻浮”层数高于 $(start_stacks) 的每一层会使区域要求降低 $(amount___3)%。

tipText.original: Nahara allows champions to complete future areas more quickly when she is easily defeating enemies, and when she is not she starts to deal more damage.
tipText.display: 纳哈拉轻松击败敌人时，可以让勇士们更快通过后续区域；而当她没有轻松击败敌人时，她会开始造成更多伤害。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,8010,1","description":"Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.desc: $(source_hero) gets a $(amount)% damage bonus for each other Black Dice Society affiliation member in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一个黑骰子协会成员，$(source_hero)获得 $(amount)% 伤害加成（乘算）。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,8010,1","description":"Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.desc: The $(upgrade_name id) counter increments three times for every area cleared.
每完成一个区域，$(upgrade_name id)的计数器增加 3 次。

specializationDescription.original: Nahara focuses on her experience to deal more damage
specializationDescription.display: 纳哈拉将她的经验专注于造成更多伤害

description.desc: $(upgrade_name id) gets a $(amount)% increase and Black Dice Society members can be used if Strahd is currently the Patron, even if they do not qualify for the other variant requirements.
$(upgrade_name id) 额外提升 $(amount)%，且如果当前赞助者为斯特拉德，即使不满足其他支线任务要求，也可以使用黑骰子协会的成员。

specializationDescription.original: Nahara focuses on her companions to bring the fight to Strahd
specializationDescription.display: 纳哈拉专注于她的同伴，向斯特拉德开战

description.desc: The area reduction in $(upgrade_name id) is increased by $(amount)%.
$(upgrade_name id) 提供的区域要求削减效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Nahara focuses on her amusement to move more quickly
specializationDescription.display: 纳哈拉专注于她的娱乐才能，使移动速度更快

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,8010,1","description":"Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,8010,1","description":"Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,8010,1","description":"Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.original: A lady doesn't start brawls, but she does finish them.
description.display: 女士不会挑起争斗，但她会结束争斗。

description.original: Do not lay a hand on me, or you shall quickly regret it!
description.display: 别对我动手动脚，否则你很快就会后悔！

description.original: I almost feel as if I remember this...
description.display: 我几乎觉得我好像想起来了......

description.original: What I've done before cannot be undone.
description.display: 我曾经做过的事，是无法更改的。

description.original: We shall forge our path through this. It can't get worse!
description.display: 我们将从中重铸我们的道路。不会更糟了！

effects.description: Increases the damage of Nahara's Amuse or Avenge ability by $amount%

description.original: I shall remain by your side, and we will see the battle through.
description.display: 我会留在你身边，我们要战斗到底。

effects.description: Increases the damage of Nahara's Amuse or Avenge ability by $amount%

description.original: There are benefits to making certain promises.
description.display: 做出某些承诺是有好处的。

description.original: We live but once...unless the Mists declare otherwise...
description.display: 我们的生命只有一次......除非迷雾另有所说......

description.original: Perhaps what I can become is as important as who I was.
description.display: 我将来的成就也许与我的曾经一样重要。

description.original: Shall we share stories or fight to the death?
description.display: 我们究竟是讲故事还是战斗至死？

effects.description: Increases the damage of Nahara's Amuse or Avenge ability by $amount%

description.original: These hands hold dangerous power. Do not cross me.
description.display: 这双手蕴含着危险的力量。别激怒我。

description.original: You will burn for this, and it will be by my hand.
description.display: 你将为此付出代价，葬身于我的手中，承受烈火的灼烧。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Nahara is a reborn fallen Aasimar undead warlock/college of the spirits bard. She fell into the mists of Ravenloft unable to remember anything from her life (or past lives as we've come to learn). All she knows is that her current Patron, Azalin Rex, has asked her to aid him against his foe Strahd von Zarovich, who for reasons unknown to her, has been desperately seeking her out.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Nahara is a DPS Speed Champion that does more damage as she completes adventures.

event_upgrades.description: The more Nahara adventures, the more she remembers of her past life; slowly increasing her damage.

event_upgrades.name: To Amuse or Avenge
event_upgrades.description: If Nahara is easily defeating enemies she helps her companions speed through later areas. If she is not defeating enemies easily she increases her damage.

character_sheet_details.system_description: 纳哈拉是一位承担伤害输出职责的速度型勇士。她完成的冒险越多，就能造成越多伤害。
